title: Supply Chain Lead Time Predictor (GE Power)
overview: Interactive lead time tracking dashboards with item-level drill-down across delivery stages and predictive completion tracking for GE Power.
challenge: Global shipment delays caused production bottlenecks due to fragmented tracking spreadsheets across regional warehouses.
solution: Built unified supply chain tracking dashboards fed by Talend ETL pipelines and Oracle SQL materialized views.
archExplanation: Talend extracts warehouse shipment logs into Oracle SQL materialized views; Tableau renders real-time stage tracking metrics.
impact: Reduced supply chain bottleneck delays by 25%
35% faster dashboard rendering after SQL query tuning
learnings: Materialized view refreshes should align with warehouse shift updates
Custom alerts keep regional managers proactive
